title: Add a publishable secondary entry-point to a library

name.description: Name of the new secondary entry-point (the deep-import subpath), e.g. `testing` or `router-x`. Resolves as `<package>/<name>` once published or symlinked.
name.x-prompt: What is the entry-point name (the subpath, e.g. `testing`)?

library.description: The library project this secondary entry-point is added to (creates the nested `<lib>/<name>/{ng-package.json, src/index.ts}`).
library.x-prompt: Which library does this entry-point belong to?

component.description:
How to scaffold a component for the new entry-point.
'standalone' generates a standalone component re-exported from src/index.ts.
'none' generates no component and leaves src/index.ts empty (the consumer fills it).

x-prompt.message: Scaffold a component inside the entry-point?

skipFormat.description: Skip running Prettier over the touched files.
